TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_malawpes, title = malawpes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/malawpes} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:已消失) malawpes tu kuya wacah i umah. 田中的煙已消失了.
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:***) mar~ɾawpəs tu kuja waʦaħ i umaħ. ********.
